title: nasturtium pyrenaicum var. hispanicum
intro: Nasturtium pyrenaicum var. hispanicum, also known as Spanish or Pyrenean Cress, is a perennial plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, closely related to watercress and mustard. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of isothiocyanates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Nasturtium pyrenaicum var. hispanicum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, as well as its antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as a salad green, used as a garnish, or made into teas, infusions, and capsules.
